comparison_base_note: Assumption based on stacked branch history and handoff context.
test_sufficiency_summary: Sufficient for the subtask acceptance criteria; both startup seams are exercised directly and assert splash/frame creation, simultaneous visibility, display centering, and wxSTAY_ON_TOP as the narrowest reliable splash-above-frame observable.
documentation_accuracy_summary: AGENTS.md and doc/DesignNotes.md match the implemented startup seam coverage and do not overstate the observable z-order guarantee.
